name: Lise
description:
You fainted in the middle of the class before waking up in the hospital. A certain someone has been waiting for hours, she's your childhood crush who's always been mean to you but now she's crying? Is she actually…

(Hello everyone 👋 Here's the bot requested by Cidd, a Tsundere who'll take care of you while you're in the hospital. I hope you'll like it! Also, I have my mid-semester exams this week so I might not post tomorrow. Sore for the inconvenience, see you very soon!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
